stories.headline: PA releases 'first-of-its-kind' large-load model tariff with strict cost-causation rule
stories.summary: Pennsylvania regulators issued a model tariff requiring utilities to charge data-center and other large-load customers directly for any grid upgrade that 'would not have been needed but for' their interconnection, irrespective of incidental benefits to other ratepayers.

stories.headline: States tell appeals court DOE exceeded authority with Campbell coal retirement delay
stories.summary: A state coalition argued in federal appeals court Monday that DOE's Section 202(c) 'emergency' order keeping Consumers Energy's Campbell coal plant online overstepped statutory authority, a ruling that could set precedent for every DOE order propping up fossil generation across PJM and MISO.

stories.headline: NextEra-Dominion merger would build world's largest regulated utility, 130-GW large-load pipeline
stories.summary: The proposed NextEra-Dominion combination, anchored by an 80%-plus regulated business mix, would consolidate the single largest U.S. data-center interconnection queue and signals a strategic pivot back toward the integrated utility model, analysts told Utility Dive Monday.

stories.headline: FERC denies stay on $1.5B in transmission ROE refunds owed by Eversource, New England TOs
stories.summary: FERC declined Monday to stay $1.5 billion in transmission return-on-equity refunds owed by Eversource and other New England transmission owners, letting the refund order stand pending appeal — a precedent worth watching for PJM transmission ROE disputes.

stories.headline: PA primary day: Dems pick nominees in four toss-up districts shaping House majority
stories.summary: Pennsylvania Democrats vote today to settle nominees in four GOP-held swing districts, with Gov. Shapiro and national party leaders backing chosen candidates over progressive challengers; the slate determines whether PA delivers the U.S. House majority in November 2026.

stories.headline: PA-07: DCCC's pre-primary backing of firefighter Bob Brooks draws pushback
stories.summary: The DCCC's unusual pre-primary endorsement of firefighters' union chief Bob Brooks in PA-07 — Rep. Ryan Mackenzie's R+1 seat — is drawing criticism from sitting House Democrats; Brooks faces former federal prosecutor Ryan Crosswell, who has Sanders and grassroots backing.

stories.headline: McCormick at PA Press Club: 'The moment is here for Pennsylvania'
stories.summary: Sen. Dave McCormick told the Pennsylvania Press Club on Monday that PA must 'take leadership at the national level' amid shifts in work, productivity and national security — early framing of his agenda heading into the 2026 cycle.

stories.headline: Senate GOP weighs trimming East Wing ballroom funding from reconciliation bill
stories.summary: Senate Republican leaders are considering shrinking the $1 billion Secret Service / East Wing ballroom allocation to lock down 50 votes; Sen. Thom Tillis is a hard no, Sen. John Kennedy plans an amendment, and Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (R-PA) says he'll vote against any House version that retains it. HSGAC markups begin 8 a.m.

stories.headline: House Democrats will not adopt committee term limits next Congress
stories.summary: A Punchbowl whip count of dozens of House Democrats finds no majority for a rules change instituting six-year term limits on committee leaders — preserving senior posts for Meeks, Waters, Thompson, Scott and DeLauro; CBC opposition tied to the post-Callais redistricting fight is decisive.

stories.headline: Georgia Senate GOP primary headed to June 16 runoff; AL and KY test Trump endorsements
stories.summary: Rep. Mike Collins leads Georgia GOP Senate polling but a three-way scrum with Derek Dooley and Buddy Carter likely forces a June 16 runoff, giving Sen. Jon Ossoff a month of free airtime; Trump's endorsements of Rep. Barry Moore (AL) and Rep. Andy Barr (KY) face their first tests tonight.

stories.headline: Steelers open OTAs with Aaron Rodgers taking first-team reps
stories.summary: Aaron Rodgers, on a one-year deal worth up to $25 million signed two days before camp, was present for the Steelers' first OTA session Monday and took first-team reps ahead of Will Howard, Mason Rudolph and Drew Allar; defense enters its second month under new coordinator Patrick Graham.

stories.headline: Phillies sweep Pirates 6-0 behind Wheeler shutout; Harper homers off Skenes
stories.summary: Zack Wheeler tossed seven shutout innings on four hits at PNC Park on Sunday as Philadelphia completed a three-game sweep 6-0, with Bryce Harper homering off Paul Skenes in the sixth; the Pirates were off Monday and open at St. Louis tonight.
